channel.title: Theremin on Lucaji’s Pages
channel.description: Recent content in Theremin on Lucaji’s Pages

item.title: Theremin
item.description: A mighty theremin build from an open source project with Arduino. One morning I stumbled across this open source theremin project: OpenTheremin on the web. They design and produce Arduino compatible theremin shields with two oscillators as you can control both tone and volume. I entered the theremin’s world and found it fascinating. And made my first attempt at it: Analog vs Digital The eternal fight. I do prefer the first though.
